content: controls/cf_runagent.cf  Table of contents This is where body runagent control is defined. body runagent control is where various settings related to cf-runagent can be tuned. See also: Run agent on multiple hosts sharing a class runagent bodies control Prototype: control Implementation: code body runagent control { # A list of hosts to contact when using cf-runagent any :: hosts => { "127.0.0.1" }; # , "myhost.example.com:5308", ... }
title: controls/cf_runagent.cf
